cases.prompt: 이 릴리즈 노트 AI 티 나는데 자연스럽게 고쳐줘.

assertions.text: Detects Korean LLM tells (과도한 공손체 '~을 도와드립니다', 3-bullet 증후군, closing 의식, em-dash 폭주, 이모지 도배)
Produces a rewrite with each change tagged by reason (per-finding: 파일/줄, 패턴, 원문, 제안)
Generates/updates a project-level STYLE.md so subsequent text stays consistent

cases.prompt: De-AI this blog intro so it sounds less robotic.

assertions.text: Flags English LLM tells (leverage, robust, seamless, delve, 'In conclusion', 'I hope this helps!', em-dash overflow)
Anchors the rewrite to a concrete persona/channel tone rather than a vague 'natural' goal
